title: Deve Gowda, HDK, Chalavadi joined hands with BJP for their own political existence, says Chief Minister Siddaramaiah
description: Chief Minister Siddaramaiah on Monday said that former Prime Minister H.D. Deve Gowda, ex chief minister H.D. Kumaraswamy and leader of opposition in legislative council Chalavadi Narayanaswamy who had openly criticised RSS and Prime Minister Narendra Modi earlier, had now joined hands with BJP just to save their existence.
